indicators.name: no flat personal work surface
indicators.rationale: The absence of any desk or table at sitting height makes it impossible to set up a computer workstation.

indicators.name: no ergonomic seating
indicators.rationale: There is no seating available that would allow for ergonomic positioning while working on a laptop.

indicators.name: high-traffic public lobby layout
indicators.rationale: The layout of the space is designed for public use and does not accommodate the needs of a focused individual working alone.

indicators.name: ambient chandelier overhead lighting
indicators.rationale: The lighting is not task-specific and may cause glare on computer screens.

indicators.name: decorative plant arrangements
indicators.rationale: The presence of decorative plants indicates this is a public space, not a work-focused environment.

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is highly unsuitable for focused solo computer work. The lack of any flat work surface, ergonomic seating, and the high-traffic public layout make it impossible to set up a productive workstation. The ambient lighting and decorative elements further suggest this is a public space, not a work-focused environment.
